# Security Checklist: Schedule open-data refresh jobs

**Purpose**: Validate safe scheduling, gating, and auditability.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/022-schedule-refresh-jobs/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Data Safety

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 QA gating prevents promotion of failed datasets.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Missing secrets cause early failure with no promotion.
- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Promotion is atomic per dataset.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-004 Failures report actionable details without exposing sensitive data.
- [x] CHK-SEC-005 Start failures prevent steps from running.

## Traceability

- [x] CHK-SEC-006 Workflow and step identifiers are recorded for audits.
